projects.raw_text:
Low Frequency Drift (with temperature) Fully On-chip Oscillator

Aug 2020 – Present


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Design of fully on chip oscillator in 65nm technology which will operate at low power that has a low
as possible drift in frequency with temperature.

Design of Current Starved Ring oscillator

Jun 2020 – Dec 2020


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Design of current starved ring oscillator in 65nm technology in which analysed the effect of input
voltage at the output frequency. Seen the effect of mismatch in term of noise and performance.

Design of Dual-band and Tri-band Impedance Transformer

Aug 2020 – Dec 2020


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Design and making the layout of Dual-band and Tri-band impedance transformer by using
ADS(Keysight) tool which will match the frequency dependent complex load to a resistive source
impedance at two and three arbitrary frequencies with the reflection coefficient of -21dB and -17dB
respectively.

Design and Comparative Study of Switched Capacitor Filters

Jan 2020 – Jun 2020


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Design and study of 1st and 2nd order of filters by using Op-Amp and Current Conveyor in 180nm
technology and analysis of both Voltage Mode and Current Mode approaches.

Design and Implementation of RTL to GDS flow for a given digital circuit

Jan 2020 – Jun 2020


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Designing a digital circuit and performing steps involving RTL to GDS flow like logic synthesis,
equivalence checking, STA, DFT and physical design (PnR) involving floorplanning, power planning,
CTS, Place and Route by using various CAD tools and understanding different trade-offs that are
involved.

Design and Study of Op-Amp and Current Conveyor Circuit

Jan 2020 – Jun 2020

Design of Op-Amp and Current Conveyor circuit in 180nm technology and study the difference in
term of Gain, Bandwidth, Power, Delay, signal handling.

Design of Single Ended Sense Amplifier for the ROM Array

Jan 2020 – Jun 2020

Design of Single Ended Sense Amplifier for the ROM array in 65 nm technology node for 10uA
On-current which is giving the best-read time of 1.97ns for the NOR cell at FF, 1.32V, -400C and
discharge current of 10.37uA at 1.08V, -400C.

Design and Analysis of AOI222 Static Logic

Jul 2019 – Dec 2019


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Design of AOI222 logic circuit in 65 nm technology. Making the layout of this circuit and study of the
pre-layout and post-layout analysis in term of Power, Delay and Area.

Design of High-Speed Comparator circuit with high Precision

Jul 2019 – Dec 2019


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Design of 8-bit low power static Comparator in 180nm technology which giving the 1.5mv resolution
with output delay of 0.21ns.

IOT based Landslide Detection System

Jun 2016 – Jul 2016


Associated with Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO)

Learned about the Causes of the Landslides and making the prototype by using different sensors to
detect the landslides.
